diff:
diff --git a/src/preview.py b/src/preview.py
index 09f54fe..516017a 100644
--- a/src/preview.py
+++ b/src/preview.py
@@ -1,6 +1,14 @@
 def preview_text(text: str, limit: int) -> str:
+    """
+    Return a truncated preview of text at most limit characters long, adding an ellipsis
+    when truncation occurs and the limit allows for it.
+    """
     if limit < 0:
         raise ValueError("limit must be non-negative")
     if len(text) <= limit:
         return text
-    return text[:limit] + "..."
+    # If limit is too small to include ellipsis, return truncated text only
+    if limit <= 3:
+        return text[:limit]
+    # Truncate to fit ellipsis
+    return text[:limit - 3] + "..."
